question: Does the model determine the magnitude of the tension in rope OA is (5/4)m₁g or 1.25m₁g?
Does the model determine the magnitude of the tension in rope OB is (3/4)m₁g or 0.75m₁g?
Does the model state that the magnitude of the static friction force acting on the person is equal to the tension in rope OB (0.75m₁g)?
Does the model specify the direction of the friction force acting on the person is horizontal to the left (opposing the rope's pull)?
Does the model calculate the maximum mass for object A (m₁) as 24 kg?
Does the reasoning correctly decompose the tension in OA into a vertical component (F_OA·cos37°) and a horizontal component (F_OA·sin37°)?
Does the model correctly establish the vertical equilibrium equation at knot O: F_OA·cos37° = m₁g?
Does the model correctly establish the horizontal equilibrium equation at knot O: F_OB = F_OA·sin37°?
Does the reasoning correctly identify that the friction force on the person balances the tension in rope OB (f = F_OB)?
Does the model correctly calculate the maximum static friction force as f_max = μ·m₂·g = 180 N?
Does the model correctly set up the critical condition equation (e.g., 0.75·m₁·g = 180) to find the maximum mass?
If a free-body diagram for knot O is generated, does it show exactly three distinct forces (Tension OA, Tension OB, and m₁g/vertical tension)?
In the diagram for knot O, are the force directions depicted correctly: Tension OA up-and-right, Tension OB horizontal-left, and m₁g straight down?
In the generated diagram, is the angle θ (37°) correctly labeled between rope OA and the vertical axis (not the horizontal axis)?
If a free-body diagram for the person is generated, does it show the rope tension pulling to the right and the friction force acting to the left?
If a free-body diagram for the person is generated, does it correctly show the normal force acting upward and gravity acting downward?
Does the generated imagery correctly depict the spatial relationship: Person at left (B), Knot in center (O), and support at top-right (A)?
Are force vectors in the diagrams drawn with clear arrowheads and distinct, legible labels?
Are labels (O, A, B, m₁, m₂) and rope orientations (OA angled, OB horizontal) consistent across all generated images?
Is the direction of the friction force described in the text consistent with its direction in the generated diagram?
Is the visual representation of rope OA (angled ~37°) and rope OB (horizontal) consistent with the textual description?
